alreadyLatest: Already on the latest rules pack.
applyDeclined: Update declined; leaving rules pack at {{version}}.
installed: Rules pack {{from}} → {{to}} installed. Run `audithex scan` to use it.
checksumMismatch: Rules pack checksum mismatch (expected {{expected}}, got {{actual}}). Refusing to install.
selftestFailed: Selftest failed on rules pack {{version}}; staying on {{previous}}.
